title: Per-generation "Run locally" override toggle (remote mode)
description: Per-gen 'Run locally' toggle (Phases 1-5) PLUS true cloud+local concurrency (Phase 6): per-engine ComfyUIController + two queue lanes + per-engine Stop + non-blocking boot overlay + loop-safe re-fire. A force-local gen runs on local ComfyUI WHILE the cloud Pod generates. Live-verified on a connected Pod (47d2cdb; Option B warm-local-on-connect in ac00689). See plan.md.
